name: web_search
description: Run a general web search and return titles, URLs, and extracted snippets. Good for news, documentation, and open-web fact checks.

count.description: Number of results to return (1-20, default 10)

offset.description: Pagination offset into the result set (max 9)

name: local_search
description: Search for nearby businesses and points of interest using a location-aware query such as 'coffee near SoHo'.

query.description: Location-aware search query such as 'pizza near Central Park'

count.description: Number of local results to return (1-20, default 5)

name: news_search
description: Search recent news articles and return headline, publisher, URL, and a short summary. Freshness is biased toward the last 30 days.

query.description: News search query; combine entities and topics for best precision

freshness.description: Window of recency to restrict results to

name: vector_search
description: Run a semantic similarity search against a vector index. Returns the top matching documents with similarity scores and metadata.

index.description: Name of the vector index to query

query.description: Natural language query to embed and compare

top_k.description: Number of top matches to return (1-100)

filter.description: Optional metadata filter such as { source: 'docs' }

name: search_docs
description: Search the product's official documentation for a query and return matched passages with anchors to the source pages.

query.description: Documentation search query; accepts natural language

product.description: Product slug to restrict the search to (e.g. 'sdk-python')

limit.description: Maximum number of passages to return (default 5)

name: find_similar
description: Find content similar to a given URL or document ID using link analysis and semantic embeddings. Returns ranked matches.

url.description: Reference URL to compare other documents against

count.description: Number of similar items to return (1-50)

exclude_domains.description: Domains to exclude from the result set

name: image_search
description: Run an image search and return image URLs, source pages, and thumbnails. Supports safe search and license filters.

license.description: License class to restrict results to

name: video_search
description: Search video content across the open web. Returns title, duration, thumbnail, and canonical URL for each video.

name: autocomplete
description: Return search query suggestions for a partial query prefix. Useful for building typeahead UI and disambiguating intent.

prefix.description: Partial query text to expand into suggestions

name: academic_search
description: Search academic papers by title, abstract, and author. Returns DOI, year, citation count, and matched fragments.

query.description: Academic query; boolean operators and phrase matching are supported

year_min.description: Only return papers published in this year or later

year_max.description: Only return papers published in this year or earlier

name: trending_topics
description: Return a list of topics currently trending on the web or a given platform, with a short description and example sources.

region.description: Two-letter country code to scope the trends (e.g. US, DE)

category.description: Topic category to restrict the trends to

name: fact_check
description: Verify a factual claim against multiple web sources and return supporting and contradicting citations with confidence scores.

claim.description: Single factual claim to verify, phrased as a short sentence

languages.description: ISO 639-1 language codes to search in (default: en)
